summary: Full end-to-end testing of NABI MEN reseller storefront. Backend: 27/27 pytest tests passing covering auth, products (price formula validation), categories, tags, settings, orders state machine, dashboard stats, files (upload, ZIP extract, traversal blocking). Frontend: storefront loads with logo, hero, 7 seeded products, category filter chip works, sort_select works, product modal opens, add-to-cart and cart sheet work, WhatsApp checkout creates order (POST /api/orders) and opens wa.me tab, favorites flow works. Admin: login with admin/Eljaraja20% redirects to /admin/dashboard, all 6 sidebar nav items work (products, categories, tags, orders, files, exchange), exchange rate update + save works, new product creation through admin form works and persists. No critical bugs.

minor.issue: FileExistsError not caught — if folder already exists returns 500 instead of 400 (re-create same name). Edge case.

ui_bugs.issue: Sheet panel (right-0, w-full max-w-md) appears to extend beyond viewport boundary when opened at 1920px in some cases; Playwright reports close-favorites-btn as 'outside of the viewport' although visually visible. May indicate horizontal overflow on body when sheet is open.

issues: Toast notifications stack and overlay top-right area near the 'Nuevo producto' button — could intercept clicks in real usage; recommend auto-dismiss or repositioning.

action_items: (Optional) catch FileExistsError on POST /api/files/mkdir and return 400 with a friendly message
(Optional) investigate FavoritesSheet horizontal overflow at >1024px viewport — sheet sometimes extends past body width
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~900 lines — consider splitting into routers (auth.py, products.py, orders.py, files.py) before further feature growth
CORS allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=False — acceptable for current public storefront, but restrict origins before production
compute_price uses round(...*rate/1000)*1000 — verified consistent across all 7 sample products and settings update test
ORDER_STATES whitelist enforced server-side (400 on invalid status) — good
safe_join() correctly prevents path traversal (tested with name='../etc' → 400)
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 7 categories, 3 tag groups, 18 tags, 7 sample products on startup. Each test uses TEST_ prefix and cleans up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_nabimen_api.py (pytest). Run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_nabimen_api.py -v. All admin endpoints require Bearer token. Public POST /api/orders works without auth. WhatsApp number is 595986616939. Default exchange rate is 7800 but currently 7000 in DB (was changed during prior testing). Admin sidebar nav uses route names: dashboard|products|categories|tags|orders|files|exchange (NOT spanish names).
rca of the issue: N/A — no blocking issues. Single test bug in initial pytest run (variable unpacking error in test_order_arribado_with_shipping using `oid, p = created_order` instead of `order, p = created_order; oid = order['id']`) was identified and fixed; all 27 tests now pass.
